mechanics.excerpt: MARTIAL ARTS" The Martial Arts Subskills represent some of the many vari- eties of unarmed fighting techniques in use in the thirty-first century: Each Martial Arts Subskill is intended t0 represent range of similar styles For example character with Martial Arts /Tae kwon do might be using that specific style or another style that focuses on kicking, such as savate 0r muay thai. For simplicity' sake, we have simply used the most commonly rec ognized names for these general style subskills character with Martial Arts adds his skill bonus t0 his Action Check result in melee combat.
